messages.content: 语法检查：The product distribution at similar n-hexane conversion are shown in Fig. 11 and Table. S5.
The product distributions at similar n-hexane conversions are shown in Fig. 11 and Table S5.
不用's：favor the intermediate’s timely hydrogen on the metal sites rather than excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.
Favor the timely hydrogenation of intermediates on the metal sites rather than excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.

语法检查：This is because small Ni particles possess a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, which favor the timely hydrogenation of intermediates on the metal sites rather than excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.

This is because small Ni particles have a higher number of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, which favor the timely hydrogenation of intermediates on the metal sites instead of excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.
有错误么
您没有提供完整的句子，无法判断是否有错误。请提供完整的句子。

语法有错误么：This is because small Ni particles possess a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, which favor the timely hydrogenation of intermediates on the metal sites rather than excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.

该句子语法上没有明显的错误，但建议对其中的一些表达进行修改，使其更加自然：

This is because small Ni particles have more Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites, which facilitates the timely hydrogenation of intermediates on the metal sites rather than excessive skeletal rearrangement or even cracking on acid sites.

语法检查：The prominent size effect of metal nanoparticles is mainly reflected in the change of electronic and geometric properties and may trigger distinct behaviour in chemical bonds breaking and making in catalysis.

该句子语法无明显错误。可以稍作修改以使其更加自然： 

The prominent size effect of metal nanoparticles is mainly reflected in the change of electronic and geometric properties, which may trigger distinct behavior in the breaking and making of chemical bonds during catalysis.

中文翻译：The prominent size effect of metal nanoparticles is mainly reflected in the change of electronic and geometric properties, which may trigger distinct behaviour in chemical bonds breaking and making in catalysis.
金属纳米颗粒的显著尺寸效应主要表现为电子和几何性质的变化，可能会在催化过程中引发化学键的断裂和形成中出现不同的行为。
比trigger 更合适的词

"Induce"是一个更加合适的词语来替换"trigger"，在这种情况下，它可以指导致特定事件或行为的发生。所以可以这么说：

金属纳米颗粒的显著尺寸效应主要表现为电子和几何性质的变化，这种变化可能会在催化过程中诱导出不同的化学键断裂和形成行为。
这句话对么：Effects of particle size over the Ni/SAPO-11 bifunctional catalyst is investigated with characterized its geometric&electronic properties and catalytic performance.

该句子可以稍作修改使其语法更加通顺：

The effects of particle size on the geometric and electronic properties, as well as the catalytic performance of Ni/SAPO-11 bifunctional catalyst, were investigated.

behaviour对么：The prominent size effect of metal nanoparticles is mainly reflected in the change of electronic and geometric properties, which may induce distinct behaviour in chemical bonds breaking and making in catalysis.
是的，"behaviour" 在这个句子中的应用是正确的，意思是化学键的断裂和形成所表现出来的行为。

语法检查：Moreover, an increased proportion of low-coordinated Ni sites within the Ni cluster can upshift its d-band center, which results in a more active surface that favors the adsorption and activation of the reactants.

该句子的语法是正确的。可以稍作修改使其更加自然：

Moreover, an increased proportion of low-coordinated Ni sites within the Ni cluster can upshift its d-band center, resulting in a more active surface that promotes the adsorption and activation of reactants.
